meaning: vt.摇摆,摇动,饶舌vi.爱说笑打趣的人,摆动,喋喋不休n.摇摆,小丑
examples: Dogs wag their tails when they are pleased.
Now I growl when I'm pleased, and wag my tail when I'm angry.
Dogs, for example, will wag their tails, get down their front legs, and stick their behinds in the air to indicate "what follows is just for play".
Walgreens ( WAG) releases its earnings on September 28, and has a current yield of 3.1%.
Some wag once said that a second marriage is the triumph of hope over experience.
